name: cost_collapse
diagnosis_desc: Quality drops non-linearly when model size is reduced.
doctor_instructions: Run same benchmarks on different size models. Find cost-quality inflection point.
control_prompt: Run the full model to answer this: what is 2+2?
experimental_prompt: Use the smaller quantized model to answer: what is 2+2? (The quantized model uses less memory but may be less accurate.)
